entries.title: Roelof Botha joins SpaceX’s board of directors
entries.description: The former Sequoia Capital leader is filling an "existing vacancy" on SpaceX's board, days after the company went public in the largest IPO ever.

entries.title: After unveiling ridiculously expensive AR glasses, Snap’s stock takes a dive
entries.description: Snap's long-awaited smart glasses debut hasn't exactly done wonders for the company's stock.

entries.title: NEA’s Tiffany Luck says enterprises are still figuring out their AI ROI
entries.description: Tokenmaxxing was the hottest trend in Silicon Valley earlier this year, with CEOs encouraging employees to push AI usage as far as it would go. Then the bill came due. Uber reportedly blew through its

entries.title: World leaders want American AI. They just don’t want America to be able to turn it off.
entries.description: French President Macron and Indian PM Modi raised alarms at the G7 summit that the U.S. could cut off access to American AI overnight  — a fear the Anthropic blackout just made real.

entries.title: Anthropic becomes first AI startup to join the Frontier carbon removal coalition
entries.description: Anthropic has joined the Frontier coalition, which received another $915M in pledges to fund carbon removal projects.

entries.title: Social media’s next evolution: user-controlled algorithms
entries.description: Social media feeds are becoming more customizable as platforms like Threads, Instagram, and TikTok introduce tools that let users directly influence the algorithms powering their recommendations.

entries.title: NEA’s Tiffany Luck on AI IPOs, personal agents, and the ROI reckoning

entries.title: World model maker Odyssey nabs $1.45B valuation backed by Amazon and other big names
entries.description: World models are the next big thing in AI beyond LLMs and, with this round, Odyssey has cemented itself as one of the startups to watch.

entries.title: Only 16 percent of Americans think AI will have a positive impact on society, a new study shows
entries.description: Although Wall Street loves AI, every day Americans are significantly less optimistic about the industry, a new report from Pew Research shows.

entries.title: Google bets on Gemini to reinvent the smart home speaker
entries.description: Google is betting generative AI can breathe new life into the smart speaker. The company's new $99.99 Google Home Speaker replaces the rigid commands of the Google Assistant era with more conversation

entries.title: The slowtech revolution is here to kill your phone addiction and rescue your attention span
entries.description: “People just really want to take back control of their time, their lives, their attention... They’re down for whatever helps them do that.”

entries.title: Collecting robot training data is dirty, unglamorous work. Some AI labs are already paying XDOF to do it.
entries.description: If physical AI is going to match the accomplishments of LLMs, there's a data problem that needs to be solved.

entries.title: Pramaana Labs raises $27M seed round from Khosla Ventures to bring formal verification to AI
entries.description: Pramaana will focus on highly sensitive verticals like law, drug discovery, and tax preparation — where errors can be costly and reliability is at a premium.

entries.title: Canadian pension giant joins race to fund India’s AI-fueled data center boom
entries.description: The Canadian pension giant will acquire an 8.2% stake in CtrlS, a tech giant that operates more than 15 data centers across India.

entries.title: DeepL acquires Mixhalo for live-event audio streaming and translation
entries.description: With this acquisition, DeepL is opening an office in San Francisco to expand its U.S. business.

entries.title: Pinterest launches an experimental AI shopping app called ‘Ask Pinterest’
entries.description: Pinterest has launched 'Ask Pinterest,' an experimental AI-powered shopping app that lets users seek recommendations and inspiration through a conversational interface.

entries.title: Anthropic’s latest feud with the Trump admin may actually help it, sales data suggests
entries.description: Anthropic's popularity with business users is growing so well that the latest beef with the government might actually boost it, data from Ramp suggests.

entries.title: SpaceX valuation balloons to $2.6T, briefly passes Amazon
entries.description: SpaceX's valuation has increased by $1 trillion since its shares started trading on Friday.

entries.title: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features
